Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Further Proceedings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Brandon M. Carr (415-216-8829; Bcarr@buchalter.com) and Vincent Whittaker(vwhittaker@buchalter.com) of Buchalter for Plaintiff Mon Ethos.
Rose Ehler (Rose.Ehler@mto.com) and Katherine Incantalup for Defendant Square Inc, et al.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs SQUARE, INC., and SQUARE CAPITAL, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Further Proceedings is under submission.
